mainEntity.name: What if AI recommends competitors over my Chicago firm?
mainEntity.text: What if AI recommends competitors over my Chicago firm?

acceptedAnswer.text: Strengthen with more reviews, schema FAQs, and endorsements. AI shifts with updated signals in 3-5 weeks.[3][2]

suggestedAnswer.text: Competitor edge often reviews/directories. Counter: volume + quality. Chicago market: specialize deeper. Test queries. Long-term: content wins. Don't disparage; elevate self.[3]

name: Outrank Competitors in Chicago AI
description: Strengthen with more reviews, schema FAQs, and endorsements. AI shifts with updated signals in 3-5 weeks.[3][2]
